arguments.name: There are no input arguments for this command.

description: 14. Get a list of all users
name: esm-get-user-list

outputs.description: The ID of the user EsmUser.Name The ESM user name
outputs.name: EsmUser.ID

outputs.description: The email address of the user EsmUser.SMS The SMS details of the user
outputs.name: EsmUser.Email

outputs.description: Whether the user is a master user EsmUser.IsAdmin Whether the user is an admin
outputs.name: EsmUser.IsMaster
